title: Add pothole detection with 50-meter advance alert

requirements.text: Extend the road detection algorithm to identify potholes on the road surface using visual analysis of road texture, depth discontinuities, and surface irregularities

quotes: it should detect the potholes on road

acceptanceCriteria: Pothole detection is integrated into the existing roadDetection.ts module
Detection results include pothole locations with bounding boxes or polygons
Potholes are visually highlighted in detection result overlays

requirements.text: Calculate estimated distance to detected potholes based on camera perspective, road geometry, and pixel position in the frame
acceptanceCriteria: Distance estimation uses perspective projection or similar technique
Each detected pothole includes an estimated distance in meters
Distance calculations are performed in real-time during detection

requirements.text: Trigger audio and visual alerts when potholes are detected within 50 meters, displaying 'Potholes on road' warning message

quotes: alert should be give as potholes on road
it should detect before 50meters far and give alert

acceptanceCriteria: Alert is triggered only when detected potholes are 50 meters or closer
Alert message displays 'Potholes on road' text prominently
Audio alert plays using the existing alert sound system
Alert integrates with DriverAlertPanel component for consistent UI

requirements.text: Add pothole detection results to the backend ObstacleEvent storage, including pothole type classification, location coordinates, and distance information
acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister supports storing pothole events with type, position, and distance
Frontend stores pothole detections using useQueries hooks
Pothole events are retrievable in SystemOverviewPanel statistics

requirements.text: Display detected potholes in the MetricsPanel with count and closest distance information
acceptanceCriteria: MetricsPanel shows total pothole count in current frame
Distance to closest pothole is displayed when within 50 meters
Pothole metrics update in real-time during live camera detection

constraints: Use existing computer vision infrastructure in roadDetection.ts and obstacleDetection.ts
Maintain compatibility with current ObstacleEvent backend storage structure
Alert system must integrate with existing DriverAlertPanel throttling mechanism
Distance estimation must work with single-camera perspective projection
nonGoals: Stereo camera or depth sensor integration
Machine learning model training or integration
GPS-based pothole mapping or crowd-sourced data
Automatic vehicle control or braking systems
